creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #4)

True, though I wonder why native is not the same a penryn (always was before llvm14 in base, and should still be according to sh line I've posted). 

Currently I had the same problem with -march=native with libreoffice (with LTO and llvm14 from ports), www/firefox with LTO, multimedia/aom and now qt - at this point I just changed to -march=penryn for ports.
